title: IssuerCodeListCodeType
description: A code is a character string of letters, numbers, special characters (except escape sequences), and symbols. It represents a definitive value, a method, or a property description in an abbreviated or language-independent form that is part of a finite list of allowed values within a code list that is managed by an agency. Use this type when the list or values are controlled by an external entity, the list or values are public and could be referenced or validated.  Note that this definition of the  extends the base code list code type with the issuer party identifier.

issuerPartyId.description: The identification of the party that issued the code
